sentences.arabic: مَشَى الصَّدِيقَانِ مَاهِرٌ وَأَنَسٌ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Prijatelji Mahir i Enes su zajedno hodali u školu.
sentences.translationEn: The two friends Mahir and Anas walked to school together.

sentences.arabic: فِي الطَّرِيقِ رَأَيَا طِفْلًا يَبْكِي وَحِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Na putu su vidjeli dijete kako plače samo.
sentences.translationEn: On the way they saw a child crying alone.

sentences.translation: Stali su i pitali ga zašto plače.
sentences.translationEn: They stopped and asked him why he was crying.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّهُ ضَاعَ فَأَخَذَاهُ إِلَى أَقْرَبِ شُرْطِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da se izgubio pa su ga odveli do najbližeg policajca.
sentences.translationEn: He said he was lost so they took him to the nearest police officer.
